summary: Phase B Stabilisation Sprint Testing - 39/40 backend tests pass, all 3 new frontend pages working. Fixed vendor credit apply endpoint (missing source_document fields) and BalanceSheet/ProfitLoss pages (API response format mismatch).

minor.issue: Returns 401 AUTH_REQUIRED despite valid token and org headers - pre-existing tenant isolation issue

action_items: bills-enhanced route needs tenant isolation fix - route doesn't extract org_id from auth headers

BalanceSheet.jsx and ProfitLoss.jsx expected arrays but API returns {accounts: [], total: } structure - FIXED
delivery_challans.py and vendor_credits.py properly implement tenant isolation via _get_org_id helper

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All 3 new pages render correctly with dark+volt design

test_credentials: Admin: dev@battwheels.internal / DevTest@123 (role: owner, org: dev-internal-testing-001)
